channel.title: Discord on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Discord on Arrans github.io

item.title: ancsemi/Haven
item.description: Self-hosted private chat — No cloud, no telemetry, no Big Tech. Discord alternative that runs on your own machine.

item.title: remorses/kimaki
item.description: like openclaw but on top of opencode. all opencode features deeply integrated inside Discord. each project is a channel. each session a thread

item.title: spacebarchat/server
item.description: Spacebar server - A reimplementation of the Discord.com backend, built with Typescript and love

item.title: Tyrrrz/DiscordChatExporter
item.description: Saves Discord chat logs to a file

item.title: ayn2op/discordo
item.description: A lightweight, secure, and feature-rich Discord terminal (TUI) client.

item.title: mak448a/Qtcord
item.description: Qtcord is a Discord client built with Qt aiming to bring a lightweight, native experience.

item.title: uowuo/abaddon
item.description: An alternative Discord client with voice support made with C++ and GTK 3

item.title: crazy-max/diun
item.description: Receive notifications when an image is updated on a Docker registry

item.title: spacebarchat/spacebarchat
item.description: 📬 Spacebar is a free open source selfhostable discord compatible communication platform

item.title: Discord-Client-Encyclopedia-Management/Discord3rdparties
item.description: A non-exhaustive collection of third-party clients and mods for Discord.

item.title: hackthedev/dcts-shipping
item.description: A Chat Platform like Discord but self-hostable like TeamSpeak

item.title: japandotorg/LemonCord
item.description: A fast & light weight Discord Client made with love using the Rust programming language.

item.title: polyphony-chat/symfonia
item.description: A Polyphony chat server, compatible with Spacebar and the Discord API.

item.title: arran4/discord-rss-cron
item.description: Very basic cron job discord bot for publishing the latest entry in an rss feed.
